subject: Consul Health Check changes for MessageRouter
commit_message:
Consul Health Check changes for MessageRouter

Issue-ID: OOM-987

Change-Id: If55855dbadcb009da3e82a2a3aa05bd49915a517
Signed-off-by: Priyanka <Priyanka.Jain3@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Message Router passes but Kafka and zookeeper are not.


Health Check: Message Router dmaap passing
OUTPUT
HTTP GET http://message-router:3904/topics: 200 OK Output: {"topics": [
    "ECOMP-PORTAL-OUTBOX-APP1",
    "ECOMP-PORTAL-OUTBOX-POL1",
    "SDC-DISTR-STATUS-TOPIC-AUTO",
    "unauthenticated.SEC_HEARTBEAT_OUTPUT",
    "msgrtr.apinode.metrics.dmaap",
    "SDC-DISTR-NOTIF-TOPIC-AUTO",
    "unauthenticated.VES_MEASUREMENT_OUTPUT",
    "ECOMP-PORTAL-OUTBOX-VID1",
    "ECOMP-PORTAL-INBOX",
    "ECOMP-PORTAL-OUTBOX-SDC1",
    "POOLING",
    "APPC-TEST1",
    "ECOMP-PORTAL-OUTBOX-DBC1"
]}

Health Check: Message Router - Kafka mr-kafka critical
OUTPUT
Timed out (1s) running check

Health Check: Message Router - ZooKeeper mr-zookeeper critical
OUTPUT
Timed out (1s) running check

Patch Set 1:

Maybe will increase the timeout as its working fine in my environment.

Regards,
Priyanka Jain
